title: FMD - Using Play Button when only one earbud is connected
scenario: Find My Device Play button sends tone to connected earbud when only one earbud is paired on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen
Pair both earbuds to the device and confirm they appear in the device list
Tap on the paired device to open Device Settings
Navigate to Find My Device (FMD) feature
Verify the device is recognized and displayed on the map/list
Disconnect one earbud (e.g., left earbud) by placing it in the charging case or turning it off
Tap the Play button next to the connected earbud (right earbud)
Observe the 'Sending tone...' message with an animated stop button and illustration on screen
Tap the Stop button to stop the tone
Tap the Play button next to the now-connected earbud (left earbud)
Observe the 'Sending tone...' message with an animated stop button and illustration on screen
Tap the Stop button to stop the tone
expected: The Play button triggers a tone on the connected earbud only. The 'Sending tone...' message is displayed with an animated stop button and illustration. The tone stops when the Stop button is tapped. The behavior is consistent regardless of which earbud is connected.
